title: Milk Turns Mobs into Babies
description: Allows you to turn a mob into a baby by left clicking it with a milk bucket.
body:
Adds an age reversal mechanic for mobs that can be babies.
Left click a mob with a milk bucket to use.

Enabled for villagers, zombified mobs, and piglins by default.

CONFIG FOR PAPER/SPIGOT:
Navigate to your plugins folder, then the MilkBucketTurnsAnimalsIntoBabies folder, then open config.yml in a text editor to change the default values. Make sure to only write true or false when changing the default values.

CONFIG FOR FABRIC:
Navigate to your config folder in your root directory (the folder where your mods folders is located). Then open MTMIB.json in a text editor of your choice. Make sure to only write true or false when changing the default values.
